channel.title: Posts on Maindak Swamp
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Maindak Swamp

item.title: 'Reviving' an old Macbook with Arch Linux
item.description: This entire debacle began when I recieved an almost decade old Macbook pro. Apart from a degenerating battery, it was quite functional. The only problem? Factory restarting it and losing my Big Sur install. Regardless of what I tried, it refused to update. The archaic UI and lack of software support was jarring, but bearable. The straw that broke the camel’s back was when Apple’s email, almost with a tinge of schadenfreude, announced I had to wait 15 days to… reset my password?
